title: API interaction with item updates
excerpt: Hello.  I was wondering if there is any ability for developers to interact with the “updates” item view.  I would want to get maybe the text of an update and date/time an update was created.  Thanks.

posts.author: liambailey (Liam Bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello. I was wondering if there is any ability for developers to interact with the “updates” item view. I would want to get maybe the text of an update and date/time an update was created. Thanks.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @liambailey,

Yes - you can read updates via the API. Check it out here!

Best,
Rachel
